articles.author: Mary Whitfill Roeloffs
articles.title: Americans All Negative For Hantavirus, French Patient Critically Ill (Live Updates) - Forbes
articles.description: The American who tested positive for hantavirus says he is symptom free while a patient in Paris is critically ill.
articles.content: Tuesday, May 11, 2026Dr. Stephen Kornfeld speaks to CNN from a biocontainment unit at the University of Nebraska Medical Center in Omaha, where he confirms he is the American patient reported to have… [+17462 chars]
